abort.already_configured: This Spotify account is already configured.
abort.missing_configuration: Spotify application credentials are not configured.

init.title: Spotify Connect Source Activator options
init.description: The scheduler discovers local Spotify Connect devices, verifies whether Spotify Web API already lists them as sources, activates only missing supported Connect devices, then refreshes the native Spotify source list.

data.auto_discovery_enabled: Automatically discover and activate missing sources
data.refresh_native_spotify_after_activation: Refresh native Spotify source list after activation
